description: Settings Page Redesign - Convert settings to left-right panel layout, move Tags/Media/Stats to sidebar, unify theme colors, merge Card Settings into Settings

userStories.title: Convert Settings page to left-right panel layout
userStories.description: As a user, I want clicking settings menu items to show content in the right panel instead of navigating to separate pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings page has two-column layout: left sidebar menu (200-250px) and right content panel
Left menu contains: Note Types, Tags, Media, Import, Duplicates, Statistics, Card Settings (merged as tabs)
Clicking left menu item renders corresponding content in right panel (no page navigation)
Active menu item highlighted with theme color
Right panel supports scrolling for long content
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add Tags as sidebar top-level navigation
userStories.description: As a user, I want Tags accessible from the main sidebar as a top-level navigation item.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Tags' navigation item to sidebar (use Tag icon from lucide-react)
Click navigates to /cards/tags route
Active state highlighted in sidebar
Tags page uses global layout (sidebar + content)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add Media as sidebar top-level navigation
userStories.description: As a user, I want Media files accessible from the main sidebar as a top-level navigation item.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Media' navigation item to sidebar (use Image icon from lucide-react)
Click navigates to /cards/media route
Active state highlighted in sidebar
Media page uses global layout (sidebar + content)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add Statistics as sidebar top-level navigation
userStories.description: As a user, I want Statistics accessible from the main sidebar as a top-level navigation item.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Statistics' navigation item to sidebar (use BarChart3 icon from lucide-react)
Click navigates to /cards/statistics route
Active state highlighted in sidebar
Statistics page uses global layout (sidebar + content)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Apply global theme to Note Types page
userStories.description: As a user, I want the Note Types page to use global theme colors for consistency.
acceptanceCriteria: Note Types page buttons use global theme color (primary)
Links and interactive elements use global theme color
Page uses AppLayout component (sidebar + content area)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Merge Card Settings into Settings page
userStories.description: As a user, I want Card Settings tabs integrated into the Settings page as sub-items instead of a separate page.
acceptanceCriteria: Card Settings 5 tabs become Settings page sub-menu items under 'Card Settings'
Clicking 'Card Settings' shows tab selection in right panel
All 5 tabs content renders within Settings right panel
Remove separate Card Settings page and route
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
